records.question: Which people have the last name Hartmann, a password of ecae473cb54601e01457078ac0cdf4a1ced837bb, and candidate details listed as Leo?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.person_id FROM people
JOIN candidates ON people.person_id = candidates.candidate_id
WHERE people.last_name = 'Hartmann' AND candidates.candidate_details = 'Leo' AND people.password = 'ecae473cb54601e01457078ac0cdf4a1ced837bb'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.person_id
FROM People p
JOIN Candidates c ON p.person_id = c.candidate_id
WHERE p.last_name = 'Hartmann'
AND p.password = 'ecae473cb54601e01457078ac0cdf4a1ced837bb'
AND c.candidate_details = 'Leo'

records.question: What people have the first name Lizeth, last name Bartoletti, login name mkou, email celestine11@example.net, password 76a93d1d3b7becc932d203beac61d064bd54e947, cell number 812.228.0645x91481, and are students with details exactly Joe?

JOIN students ON people.person_id = students.student_id

records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.person_id
FROM People p
JOIN Students s ON p.person_id = s.student_id
WHERE p.first_name = 'Lizeth'
  AND p.last_name = 'Bartoletti'
  AND p.login_name = 'mkou'
  AND p.email_address = 'celestine11@example.net'
  AND p.password = '76a93d1d3b7becc932d203beac61d064bd54e947'
  AND p.cell_mobile_number = '812.228.0645x91481'
  AND s.student_details = 'Joe'

records.question: Which people have the login name exactly equal to zops and are linked to both addresses and candidate profiles?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.person_id FROM people
JOIN people_addresses ON people.person_id = people_addresses.person_id
JOIN candidates ON people.person_id = candidates.candidate_id
WHERE people.login_name = 'zops'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.person_id
FROM People p
INNER JOIN People_Addresses pa ON p.person_id = pa.person_id
INNER JOIN Candidates c ON p.person_id = c.candidate_id
WHERE p.login_name = 'zops'

records.question: Which people have the login name exactly bkkv and have an associated address?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.person_id FROM people
JOIN people_addresses ON people.person_id = people_addresses.person_id
JOIN addresses ON people_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE people.login_name = 'bkkv'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.person_id
FROM People p
JOIN People_Addresses pa ON p.person_id = pa.person_id

records.question: Who has the login name uuol, middle name Arielle, email adele.gibson@example.net, and password 7be9c03d5467d563555c51ebb3eb78e7f90832ec, with cell number 1-372-548-7538x314, candidate details Tao, and addresses lasting at least from 2014-05-10 00:32:31 to 2018-03-08 06:16:47?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.person_id FROM people
JOIN people_addresses ON people.person_id = people_addresses.person_id
JOIN candidates ON people.person_id = candidates.candidate_id
WHERE people.password = '7be9c03d5467d563555c51ebb3eb78e7f90832ec' AND people.cell_mobile_number = '1-372-548-7538x314' AND people_addresses.date_from >= '2014-05-10 00:32:31' AND people.middle_name = 'Arielle' AND candidates.candidate_details = 'Tao' AND people.email_address = 'adele.gibson@example.net' AND people_addresses.date_to >= '2018-03-08 06:16:47' AND people.login_name = 'uuol'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.person_id
FROM People p
JOIN Candidates c ON p.person_id = c.candidate_id
JOIN People_Addresses pa ON p.person_id = pa.person_id
WHERE p.login_name = 'uuol'
AND p.middle_name = 'Arielle'
AND p.email_address = 'adele.gibson@example.net'
AND p.password = '7be9c03d5467d563555c51ebb3eb78e7f90832ec'
AND p.cell_mobile_number = '1-372-548-7538x314'
AND c.candidate_details = 'Tao'
AND pa.date_from <= '2014-05-10 00:32:31'
AND pa.date_to >= '2018-03-08 06:16:47'

records.question: What people who are students have the cell mobile number (508)319-2970x043?

SELECT people.person_id FROM people
JOIN students ON people.person_id = students.student_id
WHERE people.cell_mobile_number = '(508)319-2970x043'

SELECT T1.person_id
FROM People AS T1
INNER JOIN Students AS T2 ON T1.person_id = T2.student_id
WHERE T1.cell_mobile_number = '(508)319-2970x043'

records.question: What people have the last name Bartoletti, login name mkou, cell mobile number 812.228.0645x91481, and had an address valid on or before 2015-05-24 16:14:12 that ended exactly on 2018-02-23 22:44:18?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.person_id FROM people
JOIN people_addresses ON people.person_id = people_addresses.person_id
JOIN candidates ON people.person_id = candidates.candidate_id
WHERE people.last_name = 'Bartoletti' AND people.login_name = 'mkou' AND people_addresses.date_to = '2018-02-23 22:44:18' AND people.cell_mobile_number = '812.228.0645x91481' AND people_addresses.date_from <= '2015-05-24 16:14:12'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.person_id
FROM People p
JOIN People_Addresses pa ON p.person_id = pa.person_id
WHERE p.last_name = 'Bartoletti'
  AND p.login_name = 'mkou'
  AND p.cell_mobile_number = '812.228.0645x91481'
  AND pa.date_from <= '2015-05-24 16:14:12'
  AND pa.date_to = '2018-02-23 22:44:18'
